category_sources: source_facts.description says keychain is a front-end to ssh-agent; official README says it manages SSH and GPG keys via ssh-agent and gpg-agent.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is keychain; official README heading is Introduction to Keychain.
docs_sources: Official current GitHub home README documents Keychain usage and project details; Funtoo page notes GitHub as the official home.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/danielrobbins/keychain, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe ssh-agent/gpg-agent key management; official GitHub topics include shell, ssh, gpg, and security.
